title: error.rs: WH_ERROR_MAX doc comment names wrong constant
description:
In error.rs line 5, the doc comment for WH_ERROR_MAX reads: 'Inclusive upper bound of the wolfHSM WH_ERROR_* code range (WH_ERROR_GENERAL).'

There is no WH_ERROR_GENERAL in wolfhsm/wh_error.h. The constant at -2000 is WH_ERROR_BADARGS. The runtime value (-2000) is correct; only the parenthetical name in the comment is wrong.

This is a documentation error introduced in the current round when WH_ERROR_MAX was added. A maintainer reading this comment and then grepping the header for WH_ERROR_GENERAL will not find it, which could cause confusion when verifying the boundary or extending error handling.

Fix: change the comment to read '(WH_ERROR_BADARGS)' or drop the parenthetical entirely.
